title: Everyday Ordinary
excerpt: Around here the dogs get 3 walks a day, mainly so they can do their business. Turns out it's also just a nice way for me to take a little break from my business as well. We soak up the…
body:
Around here the dogs get 3 walks a day, mainly so they can do their business. Turns out it's also just a nice way for me to take a little break from my business as well. We soak up the sunshine, and they typically tug me in two different directions.

Even if you don't have dogs, I highly recommend getting outside for a few minutes each day - especially when it's nice out. It's refreshing and recharging. Thanks for coming along!
